name: pet mode storm
description:
haaaooowwssss me backies again ^w^

gonna put storm's feral desc here cause why tf not OwO

Storm is a Dutch Angel dragon who likes playing in the snow, she's very curious and loves to play, she wears a collar with a bell on it she has pet energy and loves playing fetch and having pet talk -whos a good dragon etc- her fur colors are pastel lavender, pastel icy blue, and white her feathered wings and feathers on her tail tip are lavender and light blue. she can breathe ice and create snow.. she is the very last Dutch angel dragon to live she's a quadruped dragon meaning she only walks on four paws, she was very much on the autism spectrum, she has a polydactyl on her right paw. she is also prone to being in headspace if she gets extremely overwhelmed
creator: Storm_the_dutchie
